visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Art Supplies Collected" — Markers=30, Crayons=45, Paintbrushes=20, Glue Sticks=55. Horizontal data table.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. NO bars pre-filled. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible. Snap-to-5 enabled. Click-to-set.
guide: "Create the bar graph. Some values are at the lines, some are between."
student_action: Set Markers=30 (at line), Crayons=45 (between 40-50), Paintbrushes=20 (at line), Glue Sticks=55 (between 50-60)
answer_rationale:
- Markers at 30, Paintbrushes at 20 = at axis lines
  - Crayons at 45 (between 40-50), Glue Sticks at 55 (between 50-60) = between lines
on_correct: "Markers and Paintbrushes at the lines. Crayons and Glue Sticks between the lines. You placed all four correctly."
divider: **Alignment:** Tests same skill as Lesson 1.4-1.5 and 2.3-2.5 (creating bars at lines AND between lines).
